title: Someone Knew My Name
content: Walking through a crowded market, Lucas suddenly heard someone call his name. He turned around but recognized no familiar faces. A few moments later, the voice called again from another direction. Curious, he searched the nearby shops until he found an elderly bookstore owner smiling warmly. Years earlier, Lucas had frequently visited the bookstore as a child with his parents. Although Lucas barely remembered those visits, the owner never forgot his loyal young customer. What first seemed mysterious became a touching reminder of how lasting small human connections can be.
